title: 1 Ajaccio - 2 Porto-Ota - 2 Corte - 2 Bonifacio - 1 Ajaccio

services.description: Arrive Ajaccio, pickup rental car at airport

day_descriptions.Day 1: Arrive Ajaccio and collect your rental car. Napoleon's birthplace has a relaxed Italianate charm — the covered market, the Place Foch and the citadel are worth an evening stroll. Overnight Ajaccio.
day_descriptions.Day 2: Drive north via the breathtaking Calanques de Piana — UNESCO-listed orange granite formations above a deep blue sea. Arrive Porto-Ota. Overnight Porto-Ota.
day_descriptions.Day 3: Day at leisure. Optional morning boat tour into the Scandola nature reserve — only accessible by sea. Overnight Porto-Ota.
day_descriptions.Day 4: Drive inland to Corte via the Gorges de Spelunca and the Col de Vergio mountain pass. Corsica's ancient capital sits above a dramatic gorge. Overnight Corte.
day_descriptions.Day 5: Morning in the Restonica Valley — glacier pools and mountain walking. Afternoon: Corte's citadel and old town. Overnight Corte.
day_descriptions.Day 6: Drive the east coast to Bonifacio via Aleria and Porto-Vecchio. Bonifacio's old town sits on white limestone cliffs above the Strait of Bonifacio. Evening walk along the ramparts. Overnight Bonifacio.
day_descriptions.Day 7: Day at leisure — beaches at Palombaggia or Santa Giulia. Optional boat trip to the Lavezzi Islands. Overnight Bonifacio.
day_descriptions.Day 8: Drive back to Ajaccio via Sartène. Overnight Ajaccio.
day_descriptions.Day 9: Proceed to Ajaccio airport. Return rental car.

optionals.description: Boat tour Scandola reserve & Calanques de Piana, 3.5 hrs
Boat tour Lavezzi Islands & caves, 4 hrs

description: Corsica's dramatic interior — the Calanques de Piana, Spelunca gorge, Restonica valley and the white limestone cliffs of Bonifacio on a self-drive circuit.
